properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Bigger than all my problems, Bigger than all my fears, God is bigger than any mountain, That I can or cannot see, Bigger than all my questions, Bigger than anything, God is bigger than any mountain, That I can or cannot see.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Bigger than all the shadows That fall across my path God is bigger than any mountain That I can or cannot see Bigger than all the confusion Bigger than anything God is bigger than any mountain That I can or cannot see

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Bigger than all the giants Of fear and unbelief God is bigger than any mountain That I can or cannot see Bigger than all my hangups Bigger than anything God is bigger than any mountain That I can or cannot see

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God is bigger than any mountain That I can or cannot see
